---
name: run-tests
description: Run the MCP server tests and report results.
argument-hint: specific test focus (optional)
---

Run the test suite for the Heroic Adventures MCP server:

1. Make sure the dev server is running (`npm start`). If not, start it.
2. Run `npm test` and report the results.
3. If any tests fail, analyze the error output and suggest fixes.
4. If all tests pass, confirm success.
